judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s final execute_python step computed EMA per CPC group and returned all groups whose individual maximum EMA occurred in 2022, but it never performed the required step of identifying the “highest EMA” technology areas for each year, leading to an overinclusive list (see execute_python using var_function-call-3133902688408324092 and var_function-call-4372299924973492362).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the final execute_python step (function-call-11897646338433823833), after loading cpc_definition and publicationinfo results, the agent computed an EMA per CPC code and simply selected codes whose individual EMA peak occurred in 2022, but never performed the required step of identifying the CPC areas with the highest EMA for each year, leading to a list that does not match the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the final execute_python step (function-call-10305099524872642050), the agent reindexed the year–code pivot to the global 1900–2024 range and filled all missing years with zeros (pivot_df.reindex(all_years, fill_value=0)) before computing the EMA, artificially extending each code’s series and distorting “best year” detection, which led to an incorrect set of CPC group codes for 2022.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s execute_python step incorrectly restricted results to CPC codes that were “annual winners” (computed via winners_per_year and all_winners) before filtering for those whose best year is 2022, adding an extra constraint not requested and thus returning only “B66F” instead of all level-5 CPC codes whose EMA peaks in 2022.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing calls (querying level-5 CPC symbols and filing_date/cpc, then execute_python function-call-11144966975493197272), the agent computed each code’s EMA and its own best year, but never identified the CPC areas with the highest EMA per year across all codes, so it simply returned all codes whose individual peak EMA was in 2022 rather than those that were top in 2022.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
